intro: Ericoides piliferum, commonly known as Pilifer, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, traditionally used in folk medicine for its therapeutic properties. The health benefits of Pilifer include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, wound healing, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pilifer include piliferin, piliferol, and other flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pilifer include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote wound healing.
